sections.paragraph:
to blow a trumpet, to trumpet. It occurs in part. מחצצרים (מַחֲצֹצְרִים), 1Ch 15:24 2Ch 5:13 7:6 13:14 29:28 כתיב; where in קרי one צ being rejected, it becomes מחצרים (מְחַצְּרִים or מַחֲצִרִים, part. Piel or Hiphil), by a jejune correction of a more uncommon form.- 2Ch 5:12, it is מחצררים, which appears to be a transcriptural error.

I.
